safety_events.narrative_text: SIGNOSTICS BLADDER SCANNERS - USCAN SYSTEM HAS BEEN UNRELIABLE TO OBTAIN BLADDER VOLUME MEASURE. TRANSDUCER /PROBE "FANNING" PROCESS FOR SCANNING IS REPORTEDLY TROUBLESOME AND RESULTS IN ACQUISITION FAILURES, LACK OF ACCURACY IN VOLUME MEASUREMENTS AS WELL AS DIFFICULT AND TIME-CONSUMING MEASUREMENT CORRECTIONS WHICH OFTEN DO NOT OFFER A RESULT.
